title: The Mystery of Humanoid Puppet
overview: After occurrences of a bizarre fire in Luoyang palace, incredible puppetry skills, the Kunlun sacred tree that has been frozen for a thousand years, a shocking bloodthirsty murder case, Wu Zetian's mysterious Plum Blossom Shadow Guard... suddenly two Wu Zetians appear in the world at the same time, and a series of unsolved and intertwined cases emerge. Watch how Di Renjie peels off the layers to uncover the hidden shocking conspiracy.
